title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Piscataway, NJ | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Piscataway, NJ. Humane, effective solutions starting at $900. Licensed experts serving residential and commercial properties.
intro: Piscataway homeowners and businesses face unique bat infestation challenges, especially in older structures near the Raritan River corridor and wooded residential areas. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bat removal and exclusion services throughout Piscataway, ensuring safe, humane, and permanent solutions to bat problems. Our certified wildlife specialists use proven techniques to remove bats and seal entry points, protecting your property from future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of bat removal expertise to Piscataway, combining humane wildlife practices with state-of-the-art exclusion technology. Our licensed technicians provide same-day emergency response, thorough attic inspections, complete cleanup and sanitation services, and lifetime warranties on exclusion work, all at competitive pricing from $900 to $2,500 depending on infestation severity.
localContext: Piscataway's mix of historic homes near Rutgers University, suburban developments around Johnson Park, and commercial properties along Route 287 create ideal conditions for bat colonies seeking shelter. The township's proximity to wooded areas and the Raritan River means properties are particularly vulnerable during spring and fall migration periods when bats seek roosting sites in attics, chimneys, and wall voids.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Piscataway, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Piscataway typically range from $900 to $2,500 depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and extent of damage. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in Piscataway and New Jersey?
faqs.answer: Yes, but bat removal must follow New Jersey wildlife regulations. Bats cannot be removed during maternity season (May 1 - August 15) when flightless young are present. Our licensed technicians ensure all work complies with state and local regulations, using only humane exclusion methods that allow bats to leave but not return.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bats from my Piscataway property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency inspections throughout Piscataway and can typically begin exclusion work within 24-48 hours. The complete exclusion process takes 3-7 days depending on colony size, followed by sealing all entry points and optional attic restoration services.

faqs.question: Do you clean up bat droppings and provide attic restoration?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Bat guano poses serious health risks including histoplasmosis. We provide complete attic cleanup, sanitation with hospital-grade disinfectants, insulation removal and replacement if contaminated, and odor elimination. All cleanup follows CDC guidelines and New Jersey health department standards.
